case_title: JONG, RANDOLPH et al vs. WONG, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONG, RANDOLPH JONG, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, CHARLES WONG, HELEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
1-CORRESPONDENCE RECIVED FROM DEFENDANT:CHARLES WONG 2-NOT A PROPER RESPONSE NOTICE-SENT TO DEFENDANT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, CHARLES WONG, HELEN
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONG, RANDOLPH JONG, JUDY COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-29-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 608 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SUBSEQUENT MEMO TO SET FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, CHARLES WONG, HELEN DOES 1 TO 10
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 608

VISITING JUDGE:JOHN ZYLKA/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:DEBORAH NEVILLE C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLFFS RANDOLPH AND JUDY JONG PRESENT WITH THEIR COUNSEL BRENDA KEITH CRUZ. DEFTS CHARLES & HELEN WONG NOT PRESENT. TRIAL PROCEEDED (PROVE-UP). WITNESS CALLED. EVIDENCE PRESENT. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLFF. EXHIBIT WITHDRAWN. PLFF PREPARES JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, CHARLES WONG, HELEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2450 SANTIAGO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $7,120.00 RENT, $1,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,170.00, LEASE FORFEITED, (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)

JUDGE:DESMOND CLERK:WILLIAMS REPORTER:DOWLING-TUCKETT 9:53AM: CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL IN DEPT. 503,NO APPEARANCE OF DEFENDANT. JUDY JONG SWORN FOR PLAINTIFF,EXHIBIT 1-LEASE AGREEMENT MARKED AND RECEIVED. EXHIBIT 2-3 DAY NOTICE MARKED AND RECEIVED SUBMITTED,JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES PLUS $10,400 BACK RENT AND DAMAGES PLUS $1375 ATTORNEYS FEES. LEASE FORFEITED,EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, CHARLES WONG, HELEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2450 SANTIAGO STREET, S.F. $10,400.00 RENT, $13,750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,150.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
